{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Herald of the Silent Servants
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Herald of the Silent Servants]] cuts with a white [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
